nasb.text: From Aroer which is on the edge of the valley of Arnon and from the city which is in the valley, even to Gilead, there was no city that was too high for us; the Lord our God delivered all over to us.

esv.text: From Aroer, which is on the edge of the Valley of the Arnon, and from the city that is in the valley, as far as Gilead, there was not a city too high for us. The Lord our God gave all into our hands.

cnv.text: 從亞嫩谷旁邊的亞羅珥和谷中的城，直到基列，沒有一座城太高，是我們不能攻下的；耶和華我們的　神把這一切都交給我們了。

ccb.text: 从亚嫩谷边的亚罗珥和谷中的城，直到基列的所有城邑全被我们攻克，我们的上帝耶和华把这一切都交给了我们。
